teams.name: Admin Team
teams.jql: project = TO and fixVersion = "AD.2.0.0-260401" and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

teams.name: Manual Team
teams.jql: project = TO and (fixVersion = "MT1.4.0" or labels = test-case-generator-agent) and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

teams.name: Report and Analysis Team (RA)
teams.jql: project = TO and (labels = insight-agent or parent = TO-12502 or key = TO-12502 or key = TO-16687) and key != TO-16746 and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

teams.name: Core Team
teams.jql: project = TO and (labels = test-runner-agent or fixVersion = "Core 1.5.0" or key in (TO-16851, TO-17009)) and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

teams.name: TestCloud Team
teams.jql: project = KTC and (component = "Playwright report" or component = "Test Runner Agent" or labels = test-runner-agent or parent = KTC-4655 or key = KTC-4655 or parent = KTC-2077 or key = KTC-2077) and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

teams.name: CE Team
teams.jql: project = CE and (Sprint = "Sprint 46" or Sprint = 46) and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

teams.name: DLT Team
teams.jql: project = CE and (Sprint = "Sprint 47" or Sprint = 47) and type in (Bug, Story, Epic)

_notes.admin: All tickets/bugs in release AD.2.0.0-260401 — Admin team responsibility for True Platform.
_notes.manual: True Platform: release MT1.4.0 OR label test-case-generator-agent.
_notes.testcloud: True Platform only: component Playwright report OR Test Runner Agent, OR label test-runner-agent, OR epic KTC-4655, OR epic KTC-2077. No fixVersion filter.
_notes.ce_dlt: CE: Sprint 46 | DLT: Sprint 47. Both in project CE. Add labels filter if you have 'true-platform' or similar.
_notes.ra: Insight Agent epic TO-12502, TO-16687. Exclude TO-16746.
_notes.core: Test Runner Agent (label), Core 1.5.0, TO-16851 Bug Reporting MCP, TO-17009 Bug Reporting
